ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
